summary: Queue System & P0 Fixes Testing (Iteration 505). Fixed SLOTS_BUSY error in detect_abuse function - changed to RATE_LIMIT prefix. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: HottestBattle component with Quick Shot button, Story Viewer with pipeline_jobs fallback, Story not found page for invalid IDs.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: safety.py detect_abuse() was still using SLOTS_BUSY prefix for rapid-fire submissions (5 jobs in 10 min) and repeated failures (8 failures in 1 hour). Changed to RATE_LIMIT prefix to match the requirement that SLOTS_BUSY should NEVER appear.
VERIFIED: check_rate_limits() correctly returns None for concurrent slot limit (allows job creation, queuing handled in create_job)
VERIFIED: should_queue_job() correctly checks if active jobs >= MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS (2)
VERIFIED: create_job() sets state='QUEUED' and queued_at when should_queue_job returns true
VERIFIED: _finalize_job() has queue drain logic - promotes oldest QUEUED job to INIT when slot frees
VERIFIED: story_multiplayer.py endpoints (quick-shot, continue-branch, continue-episode, instant-rerun) check result.queued before run_pipeline
VERIFIED: StoryViewerPage.jsx checks pipeline_jobs as fallback for legacy content
VERIFIED: HottestBattle.jsx shows 'queued' toast when backend returns queued=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Queue system verified working. Key changes: (1) SLOTS_BUSY error no longer appears for concurrent slot limits - jobs are QUEUED instead. (2) detect_abuse() now uses RATE_LIMIT prefix instead of SLOTS_BUSY for rapid-fire (5 jobs/10min) and repeated failures (8 failures/hour). (3) Story viewer correctly falls back to pipeline_jobs collection for legacy content. Known test data: pipeline_jobs story e669ab26-85c4-4c0e-b49f-6214dd4b47d9 ('Test Story Normal Mode').

features_verified.queue_system_instant_rerun: PASSED - returns RATE_LIMIT (not SLOTS_BUSY) for rapid-fire abuse

bug_fix_applied.issue: Was returning SLOTS_BUSY error for rapid-fire submissions and repeated failures
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed error prefix from SLOTS_BUSY to RATE_LIMIT
bug_fix_applied.reason: SLOTS_BUSY should NEVER appear for any rate limiting - only RATE_LIMIT errors remain for abuse prevention
